{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Soulsmith hammers
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Soulsmith hammers]] are used to inject a user's will into an object to shape its function.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
